patch.value: GH #267/#271/#272 follow-up: lifecycle automation, logical dependency validation, read format parity

GitHub audit refresh found broader open reports not safe to bundle into PR #266 after the focused guardrail and small UX fixes: #267 auto-unblock blocked_by dependencies after blocker closure, #271 detect logical circular dependencies involving blocked_by and definition_of_ready/free-text readiness, and #272 unify --format support across read-only commands. Duplicate check: pm search found no canonical open items for these exact GitHub issues. These require separate design/testing because they alter lifecycle automation, validation semantics, and command output contracts.

value.author: codex-audit-agent
value.text: Audit evidence: gh issue list on 2026-06-18 showed #267, #271, and #272 still open after #268-#270 were fixed in pm-x7g1. Deferred from PR #266 because #267 changes lifecycle automation, #271 needs a robust dependency/reference model beyond substring parsing of definition_of_ready text, and #272 changes read-command output contracts. Keep as canonical pm follow-up before creating any duplicate items.
